text.en: AGI is AI that can reliably do most economically valuable knowledge work with minimal human help.
text.zh: AGI 是能在极少人类帮助下，可靠完成大多数有经济价值知识工作的 AI。

text.en: AGI is when AI can learn a new field, plan a project, and finish useful work across domains.
text.zh: AGI 是 AI 能学习新领域、规划项目，并跨领域完成有用工作的时候。

text.en: AGI is not one benchmark. It is general, autonomous competence in the real world.
text.zh: AGI 不是某个基准分数，而是真实世界里的通用、自主能力。

text.en: ASI is AI that is far better than the best humans at nearly every important cognitive task.
text.zh: ASI 是在几乎所有重要认知任务上，都远强于最优秀人类的 AI。

text.en: ASI begins when AI can improve science, strategy, and invention faster than human institutions can follow.
text.zh: 当 AI 推动科学、战略和发明的速度快到人类机构跟不上时，ASI 就开始了。

text.en: ASI is the point where intelligence becomes a system-level force, not just a tool.
text.zh: ASI 是智能从工具变成系统级力量的那个节点。
